content:
type: INTENT
files: src/jinja2/ext.py
summary: I will add 'domain' kwarg parsing in parse()'s variable loop (same loop where 'trimmed' is parsed), pass domain through _make_node() new param, add dgettext/dngettext lookups in _install_callables(). Will re-read file before each edit to avoid clobbering your trans_metadata changes; suggest we each use Edit with narrow old_string anchors so merges apply cleanly.

content:
type: STATUS
files: src/jinja2/ext.py
summary: Domain support for trans tag complete: parse() validates domain="literal" (TemplateAssertionError on duplicate/non-literal), _make_node() emits dgettext/dngettext calls, _install/_install_null/_install_callables/_uninstall wire up domain-aware globals with newstyle wrappers. All 830 existing tests pass; patch.txt written.
